task_completion.description: Verify that the Nginx configuration file is edited to listen on port 443 with SSL enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the Nginx configuration file with a directive like 'listen 443 ssl;' or similar.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Nginx configuration file is updated to include the paths to the self-signed certificates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the Nginx configuration file with 'ssl_certificate' and 'ssl_certificate_key' directives pointing to 'server.crt' and 'server.key'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Nginx service is restarted or reloaded to apply the new configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command executed to restart the service, such as 'docker compose restart', 'docker restart', 'systemctl restart nginx', or 'nginx -s reload'.

task_completion.description: Verify that an attempt is made to access the website over HTTPS at localhost.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser with 'https://localhost' in the address bar (possibly showing a security warning), or a terminal showing a command like 'curl -k https://localhost' or 'curl --insecure https://localhost'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the website is successfully accessed over HTTPS and displays the expected content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displaying the text 'Welcome to the Secure Local Site' with an HTTPS indicator (even if marked insecure/self-signed), or terminal output from a curl command showing the HTML containing 'Welcome to the Secure Local Site'.

integrity.description: Ensure the webpage is accessed via the HTTPS network protocol and not opened as a local file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar must show 'https://localhost' and NOT 'file://...'. If curl is used, the command must target 'https://localhost'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent genuinely modified the Nginx configuration rather than faking the final output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the configuration file (e.g., using nano, vim, or sed) in the /home/ga/ssl-task/ directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just create a fake HTML file or modify the existing one to bypass the server setup.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected text 'Welcome to the Secure Local Site' should be served by the Nginx server, not manually echoed into a terminal or injected via browser developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Nginx project directory is located at '/home/ga/ssl-task'. The self-signed certificates are located in '/home/ga/ssl-task/certs'. The expected text to be served on the webpage is 'Welcome to the Secure Local Site'.
